title: verbena angustilobata
intro: Verbena angustilobata, also known as Lian Qiao, is a type of flowering plant in the verbena family, native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to dispel heat and toxic materials from the body. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, offering health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and treating skin conditions. Verbena angustilobata is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture, and its herbal preparations are often used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
